standard_variable.semantic_grain: one row per positive state episode

approved_boundary_notice.reason: Amsterdam processitems itemid 12635 / Tracheostoma is a direct interval source for tracheostomy status and is narrow enough for same-name approval when ventilation, NIV/CPAP, HFNC, and oxygen-only evidence remain separate.

database_mapping.source_grain: one Amsterdam processitems tracheostomy status interval row
database_mapping.target_grain: one retained positive tracheostomy status state episode row

identifier_normalization.subject_id_role: patientid joined from Amsterdam admissions_core by admissionid
identifier_normalization.hadm_id_role: not separately available in the current Amsterdam opening mapping
identifier_normalization.stay_id_role: raw admissionid is the Amsterdam ICU/MC local admission identifier and normalizes to stay_id under ICU/MC semantics

adjacent_status_boundary.boundary_reason: This same-name variable represents tracheostomy status only. It must not be auto-equated to invasive ventilation or any broader respiratory-support composite.

state_episode_build_translation.positive_state_translation: retain Amsterdam processitems rows with itemid 12635 only
state_episode_build_translation.episode_start_translation: use source start as Amsterdam relative support_starttime in milliseconds while also emitting relative_start_time_value in minutes
state_episode_build_translation.episode_end_translation: use source stop as Amsterdam relative support_endtime in milliseconds while also emitting relative_end_time_value in minutes
state_episode_build_translation.continuity_translation: keep source 12635 interval boundaries; do not union invasive ventilation, NIV/CPAP, HFNC, supplemental oxygen, or legacy no-longer-used tracheostomy codes into this asset
state_episode_build_translation.no_row_translation: absence of a retained row means no positive approved Tracheostoma episode under this source rule

validation_contract.positive_only_no_row_policy_check: false rows are not emitted; absence of row is not universal proof of no tracheostomy status
validation_contract.source_code_lock_rule: all retained rows must originate from Amsterdam processitems itemid 12635
notes: This Amsterdam mapping is reviewed-approved for std_tracheostomy_status_active.
The approved source scope is processitems 12635 Tracheostoma only.
Ventilation, NIV/CPAP, oxygen-only devices, and legacy no-longer-used tracheostomy process codes remain outside this same-name output.

execution_contract.formal_output_rule: Formal Amsterdam same-name output is approved only through the governed execution.py path reading this approved mapping spec and producing runtime plus rerun evidence.
execution_contract.non_bypassable_target_rule: Formal outputs should be generated only through the governed execution.py path reading an approved mapping spec and producing runtime plus rerun evidence.
